penalties.description: Two rings left the field of view and were not retrievable.

reasoning: The video was clear enough to see most actions, but there were some moments where visibility was compromised due to camera angle. Two drops were observed, and those objects were unretrievable. Timing start and finish were both observable.
technique_summary: The video was clear enough to see most actions, but there were some moments where visibility was compromised due to camera angle. Two drops were observed, and those objects were unretrievable. Timing start and finish were both observable.
